tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are text-matching (e.g., test_namespace_variable_exists checks 'variable "namespace"' in file text, test_conditional_statsd_sidecar checks for 'dynamic' and 'for_each' strings in file text, test_use_statsd_env_var_conditional checks for 'USE_STATSD' string). A stub/no-op implementation that leaves the original files unchanged would fail these tests.
